content: Convention: claudebar-{version}-{target}.tar.gz (e.g. claudebar-0.1.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz). Archive contains: binary, README.md, LICENSE. Windows: .zip. sha256sum: run sha256sum claudebar-*.tar.gz > SHA256SUMS.txt per job, or aggregate in release job. Use actions/upload-artifact@v4 in build job, actions/download-artifact@v4 in release job, then softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with files: '*.tar.gz\n*.zip\nSHA256SUMS.txt'. Permissions: contents: write on release job.
